title: solidago gigantea subsp. serotina
intro: Solidago gigantea subsp. serotina, also known as late-flowering giant goldenrod, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Solidago gigantea subsp. serotina include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be taken internally to promote overall health and well-being.
